## Problem details

| Field        | Value |
|--------------|-------|
| Problem name |       |
| LeetCode link |      |
| Difficulty   | Easy / Medium / Hard |

---

## Documentation checklist

- [ ] Problem statement is clearly written
- [ ] 2–3 test cases included with input and expected output
- [ ] Plain English explanation added (what the problem is actually asking)
- [ ] Pseudocode or algorithm steps written
- [ ] Dry run completed with a complex example
- [ ] Time complexity analysed
- [ ] Space complexity analysed
- [ ] Brute force approach documented
- [ ] Better approach documented (if applicable)
- [ ] Optimal approach documented
- [ ] Real-world analogy included

---

## Folder and file structure

- [ ] Folder name is `lowercase-kebab-case`
- [ ] `README.md` follows the problem template (`templates/problem-template.md`)
- [ ] Solution file is present (e.g. `solution.py`, `solution.js`)
- [ ] Placed in the correct topic folder

---
